2604.26139.title: HIVE: Hidden-Evidence Verification for Hallucination Detection in Diffusion Large Language Models
2604.26139.paper_summary: Diffusion large language models generate text through multi-step denoising, where hallucination signals may emerge throughout the trajectory rather than only in the final output. Existing detectors mainly rely on output uncertainty or coarse trace statistics, which often fail to capture the richer hidden dynamics of D-LLMs. We propose HIVE, a hidden-evidence verification framework that extracts compressed hidden evidence from denoising trajectories, selects informative step-layer evidence, and conditions a verifier language model on the selected evidence through prefix embeddings. HIVE produces both a continuous hallucination score from verifier decision logits and structured verification outputs, including hallucination types, evidence pairs, and short rationales. Across two D-LLMs and three QA benchmarks, HIVE consistently outperforms eight strong baselines and achieves up to 0.9236 AUROC and 0.9537 AUPRC. Ablation studies further confirm the importance of hidden-evidence conditioning, learned evidence selection, two-stream evidence representation, and step-layer embeddings. These results suggest that selected hidden evidence from denoising trajectories provides a stronger and more usable hallucination signal than output-only uncertainty or coarse trace statistics.
2604.26139.paper_summary_zh: 擴散大型語言模型通過多步去噪生成文本，其中幻覺信號可能在整個過程中出現，而不僅僅是在最終輸出中。現有的檢測器主要依賴於輸出不確定性或粗略的追蹤統計，這往往無法捕捉到 D-LLMs 更豐富的隱藏動態。我們提出了 HIVE，一個隱藏證據驗證框架，從去噪過程中提取壓縮的隱藏證據，選擇信息豐富的步驟層證據，並通過前綴嵌入將驗證器語言模型與所選證據進行條件化。HIVE 生成來自驗證器決策邏輯的連續幻覺分數和結構化驗證輸出，包括幻覺類型、證據對和簡短的理由。在兩個 D-LLMs 和三個 QA 基準上，HIVE 一直超越八個強基準，並達到最高 0.9236 AUROC 和 0.9537 AUPRC。消融研究進一步確認了隱藏證據條件化、學習證據選擇、雙流證據表示和步驟層嵌入的重要性。這些結果表明，從去噪過程中選擇的隱藏證據提供了比僅僅依賴輸出不確定性或粗略追蹤統計更強大且更可用的幻覺信號。
2604.26139.author: Guoshenghui Zhao et.al.
2604.26139.authors: Guoshenghui Zhao, Weijie Zhao, Tan Yu
